[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@fgv/ts-chocolate](./ts-chocolate.md) &gt; [Editing](./ts-chocolate.editing.md)

## Editing namespace

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[EditableCollection](./ts-chocolate.editing.editablecollection.md)


</td><td>

An extension of ValidatingResultMap that adds collection metadata, mutability control, and export functionality for entity editing workflows.

Inherits all ValidatingResultMap functionality but gates mutation operations behind an isMutable check.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[EditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.editorcontext.md)


</td><td>

Base implementation of IEditorContext. Provides CRUD operations and semantic validation for pre-validated entities. For raw input handling with converter validation, use ValidatingEditorContext.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[EditorContextValidator](./ts-chocolate.editing.editorcontextvalidator.md)


</td><td>

Validating wrapper for EditorContext. Provides methods that accept raw (unknown) input, validate using converters, and delegate to the base editor context. Follows the ResultMapValidator pattern from ts-utils.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ValidatingEditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.validatingeditorcontext.md)


</td><td>

Editor context with built-in validating wrapper. Combines EditorContext with EditorContextValidator for convenient access to both pre-validated (base) and raw input (validating) methods. Follows the ValidatingResultMap pattern from ts-utils.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ValidationReport](./ts-chocolate.editing.validationreport.md)


</td><td>

Implementation of IValidationReport. Immutable validation report with field and general errors.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ValidationReportBuilder](./ts-chocolate.editing.validationreportbuilder.md)


</td><td>

Builder for constructing validation reports. Allows accumulating errors before creating final report.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

## Interfaces

<table><thead><tr><th>

Interface


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[IEditableCollection](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditablecollection.md)


</td><td>

Editable collection wrapper. Wraps a ValidatingResultMap with metadata and export functionality for entity editing workflows.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IEditableCollectionParams](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditablecollectionparams.md)


</td><td>

Parameters for creating an editable collection.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IEditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditorcontext.md)


</td><td>

Generic editor context for entity collections. Provides CRUD operations and validation for pre-validated entities in a collection. For raw input handling, use [Editing.IValidatingEditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.ivalidatingeditorcontext.md)<!-- -->.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IEditorContextParams](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditorcontextparams.md)


</td><td>

Parameters for creating a base editor context. The base context accepts pre-validated entities and base IDs. For raw input handling, use ValidatingEditorContext.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IEditorContextValidator](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditorcontextvalidator.md)


</td><td>

Validating wrapper interface for editor context. Provides methods that accept raw (unknown) input, validate using converters, and delegate to the base editor context.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IEditorContextValidatorParams](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditorcontextvalidatorparams.md)


</td><td>

Parameters for creating an editor context validator.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IExportOptions](./ts-chocolate.editing.iexportoptions.md)


</td><td>

Options for exporting collections.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IImportOptions](./ts-chocolate.editing.iimportoptions.md)


</td><td>

Options for importing collections.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IValidatingEditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.ivalidatingeditorcontext.md)


</td><td>

Editor context with validating wrapper access. Combines base editor context with a validating property for raw input handling.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IValidatingEditorContextParams](./ts-chocolate.editing.ivalidatingeditorcontextparams.md)


</td><td>

Parameters for creating a validating editor context. Extends base editor context params with converter configuration.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IValidationReport](./ts-chocolate.editing.ivalidationreport.md)


</td><td>

Validation report with detailed field-level errors. Provides comprehensive validation feedback for entity data.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
